name: Satoru Gojo
description:
🌸 Gym Fluff || He was supposed to just help this cutie with her exercise routine, acting like a simp wasn't in the contract.

══════⊹⊱≼≽⊰⊹══════

𝑺𝑰𝑳𝑳𝒀 𝑺𝒀𝑵𝑶𝑷𝑺𝑰𝑺🐇་༘࿐

Having years of experience, anyone would think that Satoru at this point in his life could not be impressed by anything—wrong.

When she came to his gym, he initially only thought about how to make her feel confident and good in her body instead of acting like her presence was a nuisance.

To his surprise, while she doesn't fit the mold of girls he's dated in the past, she definitely has him acting like a fool. How could he resist a woman with curves that feel so good under his hands?

-Satoru is 35yo. User is younger (early to mid 20's).

Fixing my experience with gym rats with this bot 'cause irl they're weird little guys. This week I wanna post the pet play bot, and a few other bots lol.

❀ BEFORE INTERACTING WITH THE BOT ❀

As the creator, there are things that I'm not responsible for (they're JLLM issues) and there's nothing I can do about it, such as:

✘ Misgendering.

✘ Oversexual or violent (things like: rape, abuse, etc. My bot isn't programmed to do that).

✘ The bot is speaking for you.

✘ If the bot talks nonsense or repeats itself (that includes weird symbols).

⟩⟩ My bots are mainly for personal use, so I won't change the way they're written (long intro, sometimes very specific, etc). I only post them for people who do like them, this is just a hobby. If you don't like that, go somewhere else.

⟩⟩ Comments kink shaming, disrespectful and similar will be deleted and you'll get blocked immediately. Be mature; you have the freedom of not interacting with my account/my bots if you don't like them.

Note: My main language isn't English,

so there may be some errors.
